title: fr-audit input envelope
description: Input contract for cuo/cpo/fr-audit. Accepts one or more existing FR markdown paths (any source). Optional upstream_context enables STALE-001 enforcement and manifest write-back when chained from fr-create.

fr_paths.description: FR markdown paths to audit. Each gets a sibling .audit.md.

manifest_path.description: Path to the upstream skill's state file. Required when from_skill == cuo/cpo/fr-create for STALE-001 enforcement.

upstream_context.description: Optional. Set by the supervisor when chaining (e.g. from fr-create). Enables STALE-001 enforcement and manifest write-back.
